bead.title: test: ratchet backend and embedded/server conformance
bead.description:
Context: TP-001 L4 requires identical StorageAdapter behavior across backends and PRD FR-23/FR-26 require embedded/server and SQLite/PostgreSQL portability. The current autonomous gate does not clearly ratchet identical behavior across supported backends and modes.

In-scope files: backend conformance tests under `crates/axon-storage/`, server integration tests, and CI workflow wiring for available backends.
Out-of-scope: adding a new storage engine, production deployment scripts, or local-first sync.
Implementation hint: parameterize existing storage/API contract tests over SQLite and PostgreSQL where available; gracefully skip Postgres only when the container/runtime prerequisite is absent and make that skip visible.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-storage` passes.
2. A backend conformance test suite runs against SQLite and PostgreSQL when prerequisites are available.
3. CI or documented local gate invokes the conformance suite.
4. Any unsupported backend/mode is documented as deferred with an explicit follow-up bead, not implied complete.
